postings: Cohere AI (including its health‑focused unit Cohere Health) is actively recruiting for 2025 positions that span senior leadership and hands‑on technical roles, such as Director of Data & AI, Data Science II, Machine Learning Engineer II, and AI/ML Interns; candidates are expected to lead and contribute to world‑class analytics, data‑science, and machine‑learning teams that build and deploy clinical‑intelligence and precision‑AI solutions, automate administrative health‑care workflows, and advance the company’s AI‑powered platform for improving payer‑provider collaboration and patient outcomes.
velocity: Cohere is actively hiring for a range of AI and machine‑learning positions, with current listings that include a Staff Software Engineer for Inference Infrastructure, several Member‑of‑Technical‑Staff roles in Data Engineering, Next‑Generation Agents, Pre‑training Evaluations, Synthetic Data and Training Performance, as well as an Applied AI Engineer focused on Agentic Workflows; while the specific posting dates for these jobs in the last 15 days of 2025 are not provided, the presence of multiple open AI‑focused roles indicates that Cohere has continued to add machine‑learning talent throughout that period.
